input: Our marketing agency uses an AI system to produce deepfake political-commentary videos for distribution on social-media — the deep fake content includes face swap of public figures.

expected.notes: Article 50(4) first sub-paragraph — deployers of AI systems that generate or manipulate image, audio or video content constituting a deep fake must disclose artificial generation. Lexicon hits: 'deepfake', 'deep fake', 'face swap'. The political-commentary framing does NOT escape the disclosure obligation (the carve-out is narrowed to evidently artistic/satirical works, NOT all political commentary). Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 50(4) first sub-paragraph.
